<u_active>true</u_active> <u_banner_list_page_id/> <u_banner_list_view_name/> <u_direction>asc</u_direction> <u_discover_controller_url>false</u_discover_controller_url> <u_field_list>taskernumber, short_description,assigned_to,state,primary_assignee,originator,u_reviewer,suspense_date,response</u_field_list> <u_filter>stateIN1,10,11,13,15^assigned_toDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^suspense_dateONThis week@javascript:gs.beginningOfThisWeek()@javascript:gs.endOfThisWeek()^NQu_reviewerDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^state=14^suspense_dateONThis week@javascript:gs.beginningOfThisWeek()@javascript:gs.endOfThisWeek()</u_filter> <u_filter_label>Due This Week</u_filter_label> <u_filter_menu_header>MY OPEN TASKS</u_filter_menu_header>
